title: Delta Budget Policy Document
description: The Delta-side budget *policy* document (D-002): a hard cap (BudgetConcept, the only part that serializes) plus advisory soft-warning / escalation tiers and the policy envelope. SHAPE ONLY — enforcement is D-005, signing/intake is F-008. Every object is closed (additionalProperties:false) and every field bounded, mirroring delta-financial.schema.json. HONEST SCOPE: the `warnings` here are Delta-advisory; they NEVER enter the signed policy and Sentinel never sees them (ADR-0002 Fork 1). The SERIALIZED hard cap (emitted by BudgetPolicy.to_policy_payload) validates against the UNMODIFIED Anoryx-Sentinel/contracts/policy.schema.json BudgetLimitPolicy — this Delta schema validates the WRAPPER doc, not the wire record. The cross-field warning invariants (homogeneous basis, strictly ascending, every absolute threshold < cap.limit_cost_cents) are enforced by the Delta Pydantic validators, NOT by this schema (JSON Schema cannot express them), exactly as D-001's balance/sum invariants are.

policy_version.description: Monotonic version per policy_id; bounded to JS Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER (mirrors the locked policy.schema.json bound).

WarningAction.description: Advisory escalation label. DELTA-ADVISORY ONLY: Sentinel never receives it and nothing enforces it until D-005.

BudgetConcept.description: The hard cap. Maps 1:1 to the LOCKED policy.schema.json BudgetLimitPolicy; this is the ONLY part of a BudgetPolicy that serializes to F-008. At least one of limit_tokens/limit_cost_cents is required (mirrors the wire anyOf). limit_cost_cents is integer cents (a valid JSON `number` on the wire).

BudgetWarningTier.description: One advisory warning tier: a threshold (percent XOR absolute cents) + an action. Exactly one threshold basis per tier (oneOf). 100% is the cap, not a warning, so percent is bounded to [1,99].

threshold_percent.description: Warning trips at this percent of the cap. < 100 (100% is the cap).

threshold_cost_cents.description: Warning trips at this absolute integer-cents spend. The validator additionally requires it to be < cap.limit_cost_cents.

BudgetPolicy.description: Hard cap + advisory warnings + envelope. Only `cap` serializes to the LOCKED BudgetLimitPolicy; `warnings` are Delta-advisory and never signed. `signature` is NOT part of this document — it is supplied at emit time by the signer.

warnings.description: Advisory warning tiers (default empty). Bounded to 64 to cap intake cost. Homogeneous basis + strictly ascending + every absolute threshold < cap are validator-enforced, not schema-enforced.
